title: Draft
description: A node in the session's draft tree. Ported from webapp's Draft (src/stores/types.ts:1003). Version labels follow v0.1 / v0.1.1 / v1.0 scheme from lib/version-numbering.ts.

parent_draft_id.description: Parent draft ID. null = root of the tree (first completion of session).

version_label.description: Version label. v0.1 = first draft, v0.2 = main-line child, v0.1.1 = branch from v0.1, v1.0 = promoted release.

change_summary.description: ≤60 chars — what changed in this version.

directive.description: User's revision directive. null for root draft.

reviewing_agent_id.description: Which agent produced this revision. null = initial draft from pipeline.

final_scaffold.description: The FinalScaffold produced for this draft. See final-scaffold.json schema.

dm_feedback.description: Boss feedback applied to this draft (if any).
